ogTitle: Millmerran Downs vs Millstream: Climate Safety

heading: Millmerran Downs vs Millstream — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Millmerran Downs, Queensland and Millstream, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Millmerran Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Millstream (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Millmerran Downs or Millstream safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Millmerran Downs has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Millstream scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Millmerran Downs scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Millstream scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Millmerran Downs or Millstream?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Millmerran Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
